criteria.criterionText: Then it should verify that related artifacts follow the declared file-system body contract
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Cannot verify internal system behavior without external evidence like a report or CLI output.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide report.md or CLI output showing verification status.

criteria.llmObservationSummary: The specific findings listed in the Gherkin table cannot be confirmed without the actual report.md.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide report.md to confirm the presence and content of the reported findings.

criteria.criterionText: And each finding should include the expected home or declared owner.
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Cannot verify the detail of findings (inclusion of home/owner) without the actual report.md.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide report.md to confirm the structure and content of each finding.
